custom_css: header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #0056b3,0 2px 0 #004494,0 3px 0 #003375,0 4px 0 #002256!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:15px!important}header .title-3d::after{content:'⚽'!important;font-size:28px!important;display:inline-block!important;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px #00a859)!important;animation:bola-vento 0.6s linear infinite!important}@keyframes bola-vento{0%{transform:rotate(0) translateX(0)}25%{transform:rotate(90deg) translateX(2px) translateY(-1px)}50%{transform:rotate(180deg) translateX(-2px)}100%{transform:rotate(360deg) translateX(0)}}header button{background-color:#00a859!important;border:2px solid #fbdf07!important;border-radius:10px!important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,168,89,0.5)!important}aside .btn-pulse{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00a859,#fbdf07)!important;color:#000!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:12px!important;border:2px solid #fff!important}#streak-input{background:#111!important;border:1px solid #fbdf07!important;border-radius:12px!important;color:#fff!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#00a859!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background-color:#fbdf07!important;height:4px!important}
